concepts.name: Antiderivative
concepts.short_definition: A function whose derivative is a given function.

concepts.name: Indefinite Integration
concepts.short_definition: The process of finding all antiderivatives of a function.

concepts.name: Constant of Integration
concepts.short_definition: The arbitrary constant added to an indefinite integral.

concepts.name: Power Rule for Integration
concepts.short_definition: A rule for finding the integral of x^n.

concepts.name: Integral of 1/x
concepts.short_definition: The integral of 1/x is the natural logarithm.

concepts.name: Integral of Trigonometric Functions
concepts.short_definition: Integrals of sine, cosine, tangent, etc.

concepts.name: Integral of Exponential Functions
concepts.short_definition: Integrals of e^x and a^x.

concepts.name: Integral of Logarithmic Functions
concepts.short_definition: Integrals of ln(x) and log_a(x).

concepts.name: Sum and Difference Rule
concepts.short_definition: The integral of a sum/difference is the sum/difference of integrals.

concepts.name: Constant Multiple Rule
concepts.short_definition: Constants can be factored out of integrals.

concepts.name: Substitution Rule
concepts.short_definition: A technique for simplifying integrals by changing variables.

concepts.name: Integration by Parts
concepts.short_definition: A technique for integrating products of functions.

concepts.name: Definite Integral
concepts.short_definition: An integral with upper and lower limits of integration.

concepts.name: Fundamental Theorem of Calculus Part 1
concepts.short_definition: Relates differentiation and integration; derivative of an integral.

concepts.name: Fundamental Theorem of Calculus Part 2
concepts.short_definition: Evaluates definite integrals using antiderivatives.

concepts.name: Area Under a Curve
concepts.short_definition: The definite integral represents the area between a curve and the x-axis.

concepts.name: Riemann Sum
concepts.short_definition: Approximation of the area under a curve using rectangles.

concepts.name: Limit of Riemann Sums
concepts.short_definition: The definite integral as the limit of Riemann sums.

concepts.name: Net Signed Area
concepts.short_definition: The area above the x-axis minus the area below the x-axis.

concepts.name: Properties of Definite Integrals
concepts.short_definition: Rules for manipulating definite integrals.

concepts.name: Integral of a Constant
concepts.short_definition: The integral of a constant c is cx.

concepts.name: Integral of x
concepts.short_definition: The integral of x is x^2/2.

concepts.name: Integral of x^2
concepts.short_definition: The integral of x^2 is x^3/3.

concepts.name: Integral of sin(x)
concepts.short_definition: The integral of sin(x) is -cos(x).

concepts.name: Integral of cos(x)
concepts.short_definition: The integral of cos(x) is sin(x).

concepts.name: Integral of e^x
concepts.short_definition: The integral of e^x is e^x.

concepts.name: Integral of a^x
concepts.short_definition: The integral of a^x is a^x / ln(a).

concepts.name: Integral of ln(x)
concepts.short_definition: The integral of ln(x) is x*ln(x) - x.

concepts.name: Improper Integrals
concepts.short_definition: Integrals with infinite limits or discontinuities.

concepts.name: Convergence of Improper Integrals
concepts.short_definition: Determining if an improper integral has a finite value.

concepts.name: Divergence of Improper Integrals
concepts.short_definition: Determining if an improper integral does not have a finite value.

concepts.name: Area Between Curves
concepts.short_definition: Calculating the area enclosed by two or more curves.

concepts.name: Volume of Revolution
concepts.short_definition: Calculating the volume of a solid formed by rotating a region.

concepts.name: Disk Method
concepts.short_definition: A method for finding volumes of revolution.

concepts.name: Washer Method
concepts.short_definition: A method for finding volumes of revolution with a hole.

concepts.name: Shell Method
concepts.short_definition: Another method for finding volumes of revolution.

concepts.name: Arc Length
concepts.short_definition: Calculating the length of a curve.

concepts.name: Surface Area of Revolution
concepts.short_definition: Calculating the surface area of a solid of revolution.

concepts.name: Integration Techniques
concepts.short_definition: A general term for methods used to find integrals.

concepts.name: Trigonometric Substitution
concepts.short_definition: A substitution technique using trigonometric identities.

concepts.name: Partial Fraction Decomposition
concepts.short_definition: A method for integrating rational functions.
